title: Leaf Litter Plus ✅
description: Enhances Minecraft's ground Leaf Litter with denser, more natural textures while keeping a true Vanilla+ style. Lightweight, FPS-friendly, and compatible with OptiFine, Continuity, and Sodium for lush, immersive forests.
body:
![1](https://i.imgur.com/CZ88Ip0.jpeg)

🌿 Leaf Litter Plus Resourcepack brings your Minecraft world to life with stunningly realistic foliage and ground textures. Every leaf 🍂, branch 🌱, and forest floor detail has been carefully crafted to make biomes feel alive and immersive. Fully compatible with Leaf Litter Plus Mod, this resourcepack enhances visuals without compromising performance, giving your worlds a natural and polished look.

![2](https://i.imgur.com/N0psW5J.jpeg)

Step into forests and watch every path come alive! 🍃 Leaf Litter Plus Resourcepack adds depth with fallen leaves, moss, and twigs, making every biome—from dense forests to serene gardens—look more authentic. Lightweight and optimized for smooth gameplay ⚡, it ensures beautiful textures even in large worlds or with multiple mods installed. Your Minecraft landscapes will never look the same!

![3](https://i.imgur.com/Fs4vvcK.jpeg)

Perfect for builders, explorers, and content creators 🎥, this resourcepack elevates your creations and adventures. Showcase vibrant, realistic biomes in screenshots, videos, or streams 🌄. Download Leaf Litter Plus Resourcepack today and give your Minecraft world the natural, detailed touch it deserves! 🍁
